0.text: Paraseptal emphysema in the upper lobes of both lungs, more prominently on the right

1.text: Centriacinar emphysema in the upper lobes of both lungs, more prominently on the right

2.text: Linear atelectasis in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Linear atelectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

4.text: Two nodules measuring 3.5 mm and 2.5 mm in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe
